faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Mariners Harbor homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows and doors, mud tubes on foundation walls, small piles of sawdust-like droppings, and visible damage to wooden structures. Mariners Harbor's coastal humidity can accelerate termite activity, making early detection crucial for minimizing damage.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Mariners Harbor?
faqs.answer: Initial termite treatment typically takes 2-4 hours depending on your property size and infestation severity. Most Mariners Harbor homes see complete termite elimination within 30-90 days, with follow-up inspections scheduled to ensure all colonies are eradicated and your home remains protected.
